query:
-- Re-classify NULL fraud_risk_level rows using forensic_analysis JSON
-- If forensic_analysis has a fraudRiskScore, use it to determine level
-- Otherwise default to 'low' (these were previously 'minimal' = lowest risk)
UPDATE ai_assessments
SET fraud_risk_level = CASE
  WHEN forensic_analysis IS NOT NULL 
    AND JSON_VALID(forensic_analysis) = 1
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') IS NOT NULL
    THEN CASE
      WHEN CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') AS UNSIGNED) >= 80 THEN 'critical'
      WHEN CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') AS UNSIGNED) >= 60 THEN 'high'
      WHEN CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') AS UNSIGNED) >= 35 THEN 'medium'
      ELSE 'low'
    END
  ELSE 'low'
END
WHERE fraud_risk_level IS NULL;

      WHEN CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') AS UNSIGNED) >= 60 THEN 'high'
      WHEN CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(forensic_analysis, '$.fraudRiskScore') AS UNSIGNED) >= 35 THEN 'medium'

    END
